summary: Close governance enforcement gaps for report normalization, context injection completeness, playbook hard-gate parity, and cross-platform change-record validation.
invariants: INV-OBS-1: Governance core checks must validate manifest/docs/project/hygiene and governed evidence checks in one cross-platform command.
INV-ORD-1: Governance learnings prompt-pack hard gates must remain line-for-line aligned with canonical hard gates in the same playbook.
INV-OBS-2: Governed docs must not contain unresolved citation placeholder tokens.
INV-D-1: Governance-improvement context injection must include README checks and project learning sources required by the playbook.

witnesses.signal: Core check output includes change-record stage and success/failure signal
Governance playbook hard-gate parity check stage
Unresolved citation token scan across docs
Manifest validation and governance profile injection entries
witnesses.pass_criteria: manifest check passes with governance_improvement inject list including README and project learning docs

findings.recommendation: Integrate cross-platform change-record checks with strict flag support

findings.issue: Governance context injection omitted required review context
findings.recommendation: Add README/docs index/project learning paths to governance_improvement.inject
Enforce canonical-to-prompt hard-gate parity in core checker

council_summary.reconciliation_decision: accepted findings; implementation prioritized by blocker severity
council_summary.residual_risks: Records can still be low quality semantically; schema enforces structure only

validation_context.intended_environment: Governance source repo and downstream repos using .governance submodule
validation_context.evidence_plan: Run core checks in baseline, require-records, and strict safety modes plus manifest and change-record scripts
